series_metadata.series_description: Records containing information on each fire department receiving funds through the RCFP program including the application, contracts, invoices, inventory, vouchers, distribution and transmitting and supporting correspondence. Information retained in accordance with federal guidelines. Application, AD-623 and AD-628 are originals. Also includes all other copies.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Wildfire occurrence data - permanently. Records associated with other components of ODNR Forestry fire program that are supported by federal funding sources or programming (SFA, VFA, WRR, FFP, FEPP) should be maintained in accordance with federal records retention guidance that accompany these programs. If records are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copies may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Wildfire occurrence data - permanently. Records associated with other components of ODNR Forestry fire program that are supported by federal funding sources or programming (SFA, VFA, WRR, FFP, FEPP) should be maintained in accordance with federal records retention guidance that accompany these programs
